title: The Spell Binding Table
description:
The **Spell Binding Table** is the heart of your progression — every class uses it!

Whether you're a **Warrior**, **Rogue**, **Archer**, or **Paladin**, or perhaps a **Fire**, **Frost**, or **Arcane Mage** — even a **Priest** — your class tome is bound here.

Craft a Spell Binding Table and use it to bind your first tome. Spell scrolls can be found by exploring the world and taking down bosses — so get out there and fight!

Once you've bound your first tome, a reward awaits you.
